Detention_Center_Start.text: {bg:DetentionCenter}{showTextbox}{center}{color:lime}{blip:3}October 11, Time Unknown{nl}Detention Center

Detention_Center_Start.name: Powers
Detention_Center_Start.text: Ah, Mr. Wright.{nl}Thank you so much for coming.

Detention_Center_Start.name: Powers
Detention_Center_Start.text: I was just washing off my bloody zombie makeup while waiting for you.

Detention_Center_Start.name: Phoenix
Detention_Center_Start.text: Bloody zombie makeup?

Detention_Center_Start.name: Powers
Detention_Center_Start.text: I was supposed to do a zombie show starting at 9:00 PM today.

Detention_Center_Start.name: Powers
Detention_Center_Start.text: So, a few actors including myself were wearing special zombie makeup.

Detention_Center_Start.name: Phoenix
Detention_Center_Start.text: I see...{nl}So you were wearing zombie makeup at the time of the incident?

Detention_Center_Start.name: Powers
Detention_Center_Start.text: Yes. The makeup was done by around 6:00 PM...

Detention_Center_Start.name: Powers
Detention_Center_Start.text: So when the incident happened, I was dressed as a zombie.

Detention_Center_Start.name: Phoenix
Detention_Center_Start.text: (This sounds like an important testimony.{nl}I should take notes.)
"Zombie's Special Makeup" added to the Court Record.

Detention_Center_Start.name: Phoenix
Detention_Center_Start.text: (What else should I ask...)

Detention_Center_Start.name: Powers
Detention_Center_Start.text: Mr. Daiba is a senior action star whom I truly respect from the bottom of my heart.

Detention_Center_Start.name: Powers
Detention_Center_Start.text: We hit it off, shared common hobbies,{nl}and he treated me very well.

Detention_Center_Start.name: Phoenix
Detention_Center_Start.text: What kind of hobbies?

Detention_Center_Start.name: Powers
Detention_Center_Start.text: We were totally into the popular "Jammin' Ninja"{nl}figures.

Detention_Center_Start.name: Powers
Detention_Center_Start.text: Mr. Daiba was a hardcore fan, it was amazing.{nl}Compared to him, I'm just a casual.

Detention_Center_Start.name: Powers
Detention_Center_Start.text: I mean, he has a super rare giant figure.

Detention_Center_Start.name: Powers
Detention_Center_Start.text: That was Mr. Daiba's pride and joy,{nl}kept locked away in a cabinet.

Detention_Center_Start.name: Powers
Detention_Center_Start.text: But Mr. Daiba was a great guy,{nl}so he'd show it to anyone who asked.

Detention_Center_Start.name: Powers
Detention_Center_Start.text: The only thing that excites me as much as that is the gold-plated Jammin' Ninja.

Detention_Center_Start.name: Powers
Detention_Center_Start.text: That's a figure that only the person who draws the last ticket at the store can get...

Detention_Center_Start.name: Phoenix
Detention_Center_Start.text: Mr. Powers...{nl}Mr. Powers. I understand all about the figures.

Detention_Center_Start.name: Phoenix
Detention_Center_Start.text: But right now...

Detention_Center_Start.name: Powers
Detention_Center_Start.text: Huh...?{nl}Ah, right!{nl}I'm such a geek, I just couldn't help myself...

Detention_Center_Start.name: Powers
Detention_Center_Start.text: I thought it might help solve the case, but...{nl}I'm so sorry!

Detention_Center_Start.name: Phoenix
Detention_Center_Start.text: (What else should I ask...)

Detention_Center_Start.name: Phoenix
Detention_Center_Start.text: Please tell me what happened at the time of the incident, in order.

Detention_Center_Start.name: Powers
Detention_Center_Start.text: Understood.

Detention_Center_Start.name: Powers
Detention_Center_Start.text: Around 6:00 PM, I received the lunchboxes for the troupe members from the caterer...

Detention_Center_Start.name: Powers
Detention_Center_Start.text: I went to the manager's office first,{nl}and gave one to Mr. Daiba.

Detention_Center_Start.name: Phoenix
Detention_Center_Start.text: Was there anyone else in the manager's office at the time?

Detention_Center_Start.name: Powers
Detention_Center_Start.text: No. It was just Mr. Daiba.

Detention_Center_Start.name: Phoenix
Detention_Center_Start.text: About the lunchboxes,{nl}does the manager get a special one or something?

Detention_Center_Start.name: Powers
Detention_Center_Start.text: Mr. Daiba isn't like that.{nl}He always said he was fine with the same lunchbox as us.

Detention_Center_Start.name: Powers
Detention_Center_Start.text: After that, I headed to the stage,{nl}and ate my lunchbox there with the troupe members.

Detention_Center_Start.name: Powers
Detention_Center_Start.text: Around 7:15 PM, I started collecting everyone's empty lunchboxes like usual.

Detention_Center_Start.name: Powers
Detention_Center_Start.text: I went to the manager's office last,{nl}but there was no answer when I knocked...

Detention_Center_Start.name: Powers
Detention_Center_Start.text: The door was locked, so I went in using the spare key,{nl}but no one was inside.

Detention_Center_Start.name: Phoenix
Detention_Center_Start.text: (So there was no one in the manager's office at 7:15 PM?)

Detention_Center_Start.name: Powers
Detention_Center_Start.text: There was one half-eaten fried food lunchbox left on the table.

Detention_Center_Start.name: Powers
Detention_Center_Start.text: I figured he still intended to eat it...{nl}so I left it there, exited the room, and locked the door.

Detention_Center_Start.name: Phoenix
Detention_Center_Start.text: What did you do after that?

Detention_Center_Start.name: Powers
Detention_Center_Start.text: I left the collected lunchboxes in front of the manager's office,{nl}and went out for a bit by myself.

Detention_Center_Start.name: Phoenix
Detention_Center_Start.text: You went out?

Detention_Center_Start.name: Powers
Detention_Center_Start.text: To a candy store.{nl}It's right near Joypolis.

Detention_Center_Start.name: Powers
Detention_Center_Start.text: Probably about a 10-minute walk.

Detention_Center_Start.name: Powers
Detention_Center_Start.text: The higher-ups told anyone wearing special makeup not to leave Joypolis, but...

Detention_Center_Start.name: Powers
Detention_Center_Start.text: Actually, I sneaked out alone to go have some fun.

Detention_Center_Start.name: Powers
Detention_Center_Start.text: And then, I returned to the Joypolis manager's office around 8:00 PM.

Detention_Center_Start.name: Powers
Detention_Center_Start.text: I was supposed to have a meeting with Mr. Daiba about my salary.

Detention_Center_Start.name: Powers
Detention_Center_Start.text: But there was no answer when I knocked,{nl}and the door was still locked...

Detention_Center_Start.name: Powers
Detention_Center_Start.text: I had a bad feeling, so I went inside with the spare key,{nl}and found Mr. Daiba's mangled body...

Detention_Center_Start.name: Powers
Detention_Center_Start.text: He had a knife sticking out of his neck...{nl}I knew at a glance that he was dead.

Detention_Center_Start.name: Phoenix
Detention_Center_Start.text: (In other words, the time of the crime was between 7:15 PM and 8:00 PM...)

Detention_Center_Start.name: Powers
Detention_Center_Start.text: Thinking I had to report it,{nl}I hurried out of the manager's office to find a phone.

Detention_Center_Start.name: Powers
Detention_Center_Start.text: Because there's no phone in the manager's office,{nl}and I didn't have my cell phone.

Detention_Center_Start.name: Phoenix
Detention_Center_Start.text: Did you lock the door when you left the manager's office?

Detention_Center_Start.name: Powers
Detention_Center_Start.text: I don't know...{nl}I can't remember that far.

Detention_Center_Start.name: Phoenix
Detention_Center_Start.text: Hmm...

Detention_Center_Start.name: Powers
Detention_Center_Start.text: What's wrong, Mr. Wright?

Detention_Center_Start.name: Phoenix
Detention_Center_Start.text: I was thinking...{nl}if only we could prove that you were at the candy store...

Detention_Center_Start.name: Powers
Detention_Center_Start.text: That I was at the candy store...

Detention_Center_Start.name: Powers
Detention_Center_Start.text: Let's see...

Detention_Center_Start.name: Powers
Detention_Center_Start.text: Hmm...{nl}Oh, how about the gold-plated Jammin' Ninja figure!

Detention_Center_Start.name: Powers
Detention_Center_Start.text: Actually, when I went to the candy store today,{nl}I drew a ticket and got that figure.

Detention_Center_Start.name: Powers
Detention_Center_Start.text: I suppose that was around 7:40 PM...

Detention_Center_Start.name: Phoenix
Detention_Center_Start.text: That's the figure you mentioned...{nl}The one that only the person who draws the last ticket can get...

Detention_Center_Start.name: Powers
Detention_Center_Start.text: That's right!{nl}I got it from winning the "Last First Price"!

Detention_Center_Start.name: Powers
Detention_Center_Start.text: No...{nl}Something like this wouldn't serve as proof, would it...

Detention_Center_Start.name: Powers
Detention_Center_Start.text: I mean, the Last First Price can pop up at any store in the country...

Detention_Center_Start.name: Powers
Detention_Center_Start.text: I'm so sorry...

Detention_Center_Start.name: Phoenix
Detention_Center_Start.text: (If it's about the person who drew the last ticket,{nl}the candy store owner should remember them.)

Detention_Center_Start.name: Phoenix
Detention_Center_Start.text: (This is good information. I should take notes.)
"Last First Price" added to the Court Record.

Detention_Center_Start.name: Powers
Detention_Center_Start.text: Mr. Wright...{nl}I'm a man with no redeeming qualities other than action.

Detention_Center_Start.name: Powers
Detention_Center_Start.text: But I absolutely did not kill him.{nl}And I have no memory of the soy sauce packet in my locker.

Detention_Center_Start.name: Powers
Detention_Center_Start.text: Someone is framing me.{nl}Please, I'm begging you to help me...

Detention_Center_Start.name: Phoenix
Detention_Center_Start.text: I understand.{nl}I will do my absolute best to prove your innocence.

Detention_Center_Start.name: Powers
Detention_Center_Start.text: Thank you!{nl}I can't thank you enough!

Detention_Center_Start.name: Phoenix
Detention_Center_Start.text: (Alright. I guess that's about it here.)

Detention_Center_Start.name: Phoenix
Detention_Center_Start.text: (Once all the info is gathered, let's head to court.{nl}I'll reveal everything there!)
{setState:Detention_Center_done,true}{hideTextbox}{stopBGM:true}{p:500}{hideCharacter}{fadeOutFg}{fadeBg:mayaMove}{playSound:jingle}{sectionEnd}{skip:0}
